title: lessingianthus tomentellus
intro: Lessingianthus tomentellus, also known as the "velvety daisy," is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lessingianthus tomentellus are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
